subject: leave Jeffrey alone
body:
I'd loved hearing your voice the other day ... I really miss you

I found something on YouTube just now ... it's a song about Barry Bonds, 
Clinton and you
       ( I couldn't help but like the artist)

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r25WtALegfw

 ( I have a few videos of the kids on Youtube ...
 if you search: KellyUmekubo you can see them )
 




**************
Biggest Grammy Award surprises of all time on AOL Music.
     
(http://music.aol.com/grammys/pictures/never-won-a-grammy?NCID=aolcmp003000000025
48)
